challenges.title: Simple Past: Was / Were & Regular Verbs

questions.prompt: When do we use the simple past tense (一般过去时) in English?
options: To talk about actions that are happening right now.
To talk about completed actions that happened at a specific time in the past.
To talk about future predictions or plans.
To talk about actions that have been going on for a long time.
questions.explanation: 一般过去时主要用于表示过去某个特定时间发生的动作或存在的状态，也可以表示过去经常或反复发生的动作。动作已经完成。
questions.hint: 用于描述在“过去已完成”的事件。

questions.prompt: What are the past forms of the link verb "be" (am, is, are) in the simple past tense?
questions.explanation: 在一般过去时中，be 动词的单数形式 am/is 变为 was；复数形式 are 变为 were。主语 I, he, she, it 用 was；we, you, they 用 were。
questions.hint: 单数用 was，复数用 were（I 用 was，you 用 were）。

questions.prompt: What is the general rule for changing a regular verb into its past form?
options: Add "-ing" to the end of the verb.
Add "-ed" to the end of the verb.
Add "-s" or "-es" to the end of the verb.
Double the first letter of the verb.
questions.explanation: 规则动词变过去式的基本规则是在动词原形词尾加 -ed。如果是以 e 结尾的动词则直接加 -d。
questions.hint: 规则变化加 -ed，如 work -> worked。

questions.prompt: Which of the following past forms of regular verbs is spelled incorrectly?
questions.explanation: 以“辅音字母 + y”结尾的动词，变过去式时需要变 y 为 i 再加 -ed。所以 study 的过去式是 studied，而 studyed 是错误的。
questions.hint: 辅音 + y 结尾的动词，变 y 为 i 加 ed。

questions.prompt: "How was your school trip yesterday, Eric?" — "It ____ wonderful. We visited a local farm."
questions.explanation: 时间状语 yesterday 表明是一般过去时。主语 It 是单数，be 动词用 was。
questions.hint: 时间状语是 yesterday，主语为 it，用 was。

questions.prompt: "Where were you last Sunday morning?" — "I ____ in the library. I studied there."
questions.explanation: 问句使用 were 提问过去的状态。答语主语是 I，在过去时中 I 搭配 was。
questions.hint: 主语是 I，在一般过去时中 be 动词用 was。

questions.prompt: Complete the sentence: "Yesterday, our class ____ (visit) the science museum. We loved the exhibits."
questions.explanation: 时间状语 Yesterday 表明是过去发生的事情。visit 是规则动词，过去式为 visited。
questions.hint: visit 变过去式加 -ed。

questions.prompt: Choose the correct past forms: "We ____ very happy because the weather ____ sunny last week."
questions.explanation: 时间是 last week（过去时）。第一句主语 We 是复数，用 were；第二句主语 the weather 是不可数/单数，用 was。
questions.hint: 第一空主语 We（复数），第二空主语 the weather（单数）。

questions.prompt: What is the past form of the verb "stop"?
questions.explanation: stop 是重读闭音节单音节词，以“辅音+元音+辅音”结尾，变过去式时需要双写末尾的辅音字母 p 再加 -ed，即 stopped。
questions.hint: 双写 p 再加 ed。

questions.prompt: "Why did the team stay late yesterday?" — "They ____ (practise) the violin for the play."
questions.explanation: 问句中的 yesterday 提示时间是过去，动词 practise 是以 e 结尾的规则动词，直接加 d 变成 practised。
questions.hint: 以字母 e 结尾的规则动词变过去式，在词尾直接加 -d。

questions.prompt: Which time expression is NOT typically used with the simple past tense?
questions.explanation: right now（此刻，现在）是现在进行时的标志词，不能与一般过去时连用。yesterday, ago, last 都是过去时的典型标志。
questions.hint: 找出表示“现在”的时间状语。

questions.prompt: "Who ____ the room clean and tidy this morning?" — "Tony and Mary did. They swept the floor."
questions.explanation: 答语中 Tony and Mary did（did 代替过去动作）和 swept（sweep的过去式）提示时间是过去。keep 的过去式是不规则变化 kept。
questions.hint: 注意 keep 的过去式是不规则的 kept。

questions.prompt: What is the past form of the regular verb "carry" (as in "elephants carry things")?
questions.explanation: carry 是以“辅音字母 r + y”结尾的动词，变过去式时变 y 为 i 加 -ed，为 carried。
questions.hint: 以辅音加 y 结尾，变 y 为 i 再加 ed。

questions.prompt: Choose the correct verb forms: "My family ____ (live) in Thailand three years ago. We ____ (love) it."
questions.explanation: 时间状语 three years ago（三年前）表示过去。live 和 love 过去式分别为 lived 和 loved。时态应保持一致，都是一般过去时。
questions.hint: 两空都是一般过去时态，动词用过去式。

questions.prompt: "Were you blind from birth?" — "No, I ____ not. I lost my sight after an accident."
questions.explanation: 问句使用 be 动词过去式 were 提问过去的状态。回答的主语是 I，过去时否定形式为 I was not。
questions.hint: I 对应的 be 动词过去式是 was。

questions.prompt: What is the correct spelling of the past form of the verb "hurry"?
questions.explanation: hurry 以辅音字母 r 加 y 结尾，变过去式需变 y 为 i 再加 -ed，为 hurried。
questions.hint: 辅音 + y 结尾变过去式规律。

questions.prompt: Identify the sentence that describes a past habit or regular past action:
options: She is playing the violin now.
Last term, she always arrived on time for school.
She will visit the farm next week.
She has to clean her room.
questions.explanation: B项中 Last term（上学期）和 arrived（过去式）体现了过去，always 表示习惯性的动作。这是用过去时表示过去的习惯。A是现在进行时，C是将来时，D是现在时。
questions.hint: 寻找包含过去时间标志（Last term）和过去式动词（arrived）的选项。

questions.prompt: Complete the diary entry: "We ____ (walk) to the farm. Along the way, we ____ (chat) happily."
questions.explanation: 第一空 walk 变过去式为 walked。第二空 chat 是重读闭音节词（辅元辅），变过去式需双写 t 再加 -ed，为 chatted。故选 A。
questions.hint: 注意 chat 变过去式需要双写 t 再加 ed。

questions.prompt: "Did you play basketball yesterday?" — "No, I didn't. I ____ (practise) the piano all day."
questions.explanation: 昨天（yesterday）没有打篮球而在练琴，表示过去发生的动作。practise 的过去式是 practised。
questions.hint: 表示昨天的动作，用过去式形式。

questions.prompt: Identify the grammatically correct sentence in the simple past:
options: They were very friendly to us last night.
They was very friendly to us last night.
They are very friendly to us last night.
They were very friend to us last night.
questions.explanation: 时间状语 last night 提示过去时。主语 They 是复数，be 动词过去式用 were，friendly 是形容词作表语。B项 was 错误；C项 are 是现在时；D项 friend 是名词，不能用作描述性表语。
questions.hint: They 对应 were，friendly 是形容词表示“友好的”。
